base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of portraits — a ui (portrait) from 1993 nba jam. Player portraits — 27 NBA teams × 2 players = 54 digitized-face mugshots + hidden characters (Bill Clinton/Michael Jordan removed in final). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Player portraits — 27 NBA teams × 2 players = 54 digitized-face mugshots + hidden characters (Bill Clinton/Michael Jordan removed in final)
